title: Bulwark Workstate feed (v1)
description: Bulwark-owned security/inventory feed emitted by `bulwark workstate-feed` for Workstate ingestion. Distinct from `bulwark scan --json`, which is Bulwark's general inventory report.
$comment: Modeled from bulwark-core/src/core/report/workstate.rs. JSON Schema does not enforce item_count == items.length; Bulwark's producer contract test (workstate_feed_contract) covers that invariant.

schema_version.description: Integer major version. Bumped only on a breaking change.

generated_at.description: When Bulwark generated this feed, as an RFC3339 timestamp.

item_count.description: Number of items in the feed (equals items.length).

id.description: Stable identifier for the item (the discovered file path).

name.description: File name, or null when it cannot be determined.

path.description: Filesystem path of the discovered item.

language.description: Detected language/kind of the item, e.g. "Bash".

is_executable.description: Whether the file has an executable bit set.

description.description: Optional human description, or null when absent.
